ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the region */,
  "gss_code" TEXT /* GSS code of the region */,
  "chapman_code" TEXT /* Chapman code of the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "osgb_cty" TEXT /* OSGB county type */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country region (e.g., GB-ENG) */,
  "metropolitan_county_gss_code" TEXT /* GSS code of the metropolitan county */,
  "uk_region_gss_code" TEXT /* GSS code of the UK region */,
  "district_county_gss_code" TEXT /* GSS code of the district county */,
  "historic" TEXT /* Historical status (Y/N) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the region */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., metropolitan county, non-metropolitan county, district) */,
  "region_status" TEXT /* Status of the region (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_district_county_gss_code FOREIGN KEY ("district_county_gss_code") REFERENCES district_counties ("gss_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_uk_region_gss_code FOREIGN KEY ("uk_region_gss_code") REFERENCES uk_regions ("gss_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_metropolitan_county_gss_code FOREIGN KEY ("metropolitan_county_gss_code") REFERENCES metropolitan_counties ("gss_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "metropolitan_counties" (
  "metropolitan_county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan county */,
  "gss_code" TEXT /* GSS code of the metropolitan county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan county */,
  "osgb_cty" TEXT /* OSGB county type */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country region (e.g., GB-ENG) */,
  "count_of_districts" INTEGER /* Number of districts within the metropolitan county */,
  "area_of_county" REAL /* Total area of the metropolitan county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metropolitan_county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uk_regions" (
  "uk_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UK region */,
  "gss_code" TEXT /* GSS code of the UK region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the UK region */,
  "osgb_cty" TEXT /* OSGB county type */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country region (e.g., GB-ENG) */,
  "count_of_metropolitan_counties" INTEGER /* Number of metropolitan counties within the UK region */,
  "area_of_region" REAL /* Total area of the UK region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uk_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_counties" (
  "district_county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district county */,
  "gss_code" TEXT /* GSS code of the district county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the district county */,
  "osgb_cty" TEXT /* OSGB county type */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country region (e.g., GB-ENG) */,
  "count_of_districts" INTEGER /* Number of districts within the district county */,
  "area_of_district" REAL /* Total area of the district county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historic_regions" (
  "historic_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historic region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the historic region */,
  "osgb_cty" TEXT /* OSGB county type */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country region (e.g., GB-ENG) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the historic region */,
  "historic_period" TEXT /* Time period when the region was historically significant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historic_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_category" TEXT /* Category of the note (e.g., demographic, economic, environmental) */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the note (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_notes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the region */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the region was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the region (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the region was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_demographic_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the population */,
  "population_by_age_group" TEXT /* Population distribution by age groups */,
  "population_by_ethnicity" TEXT /* Population distribution by ethnicities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_economic_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income */,
  "gdp_by_industry" TEXT /* GDP contribution by industries */,
  "unemployment_rate_by_age_group" TEXT /* Unemployment rate by age groups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_environmental_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the environmental data */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air Quality Index */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water Quality Index */,
  "forest_coverage" REAL /* Forest coverage percentage */,
  "carbon_emissions" REAL /* Carbon emissions in metric tons */,
  "air_quality_by_pollutant" TEXT /* Air quality data by pollutants */,
  "water_quality_by_parameter" TEXT /* Water quality data by parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_education_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the education data */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Enrollment rate in schools */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate from schools */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  "average_test_scores" REAL /* Average test scores */,
  "enrollment_rate_by_age_group" TEXT /* Enrollment rate by age groups */,
  "graduation_rate_by_field_of_study" TEXT /* Graduation rate by fields of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_health_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the health data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate */,
  "hospital_beds_per_1000" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1000 population */,
  "doctors_per_1000" REAL /* Number of doctors per 1000 population */,
  "life_expectancy_by_age_group" TEXT /* Life expectancy by age groups */,
  "infant_mortality_rate_by_ethnicity" TEXT /* Infant mortality rate by ethnicities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_housing_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the housing data */,
  "average_house_price" REAL /* Average house price */,
  "homelessness_rate" REAL /* Homelessness rate */,
  "rental_price_index" REAL /* Rental price index */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate */,
  "average_rental_price_by_district" TEXT /* Average rental price by districts */,
  "homelessness_rate_by_demographic" TEXT /* Homelessness rate by demographics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_crime_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime data */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Violent crime rate */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Property crime rate */,
  "arrest_rate" REAL /* Arrest rate */,
  "crime_rate_by_type" TEXT /* Crime rate by crime types */,
  "arrest_rate_by_age_group" TEXT /* Arrest rate by age groups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "year")
)
